summary: Completed e2e testing of OCB AI Super App - WhatsApp Integration, CRM, Branches, Knowledge Base, AI Chat, Analytics. Fixed 1 frontend bug in WhatsApp Messages filter.

ui_bugs.issue: Select filter had empty string value causing React error

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1) - minor rendering issue but charts display correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Recommend adding data-testid attributes to WhatsApp tab buttons for better test automation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Test customers, branches, knowledge items, WhatsApp config, and test messages created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. WhatsApp Integration fully functional with all 5 tabs (Configuration, Test Simulator, Messages, Logs, Webhook). Red+Gold elegant dark theme applied consistently across all pages.

features_verified.login_registration: Working - Login with test credentials successful
features_verified.dashboard: Working - Stats cards, charts, and quick actions display correctly with Red+Gold theme
features_verified.crm: Working - Customer list and Add Customer form functional
features_verified.branches: Working - Branch list and creation functional (requires 'location' field)
features_verified.knowledge_base: Working - Knowledge list and Add Knowledge form functional
features_verified.ai_chat: Working - Chat interface sends messages and receives AI responses
features_verified.whatsapp_config: Working - Configuration loads saved data, provider settings editable
features_verified.whatsapp_test_simulator: Working - Simulates incoming message, shows AI response
features_verified.whatsapp_messages: Working - Message history table with filters
features_verified.whatsapp_logs: Working - System logs with webhook and AI events
features_verified.whatsapp_webhook: Working - Shows webhook URL, verify token, and integration status
features_verified.red_gold_theme: Consistently applied across all pages with dark background, red accents, and gold/amber text
